/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/neost.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neost.dir/src/audio/Audio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neost.dir/src/audio/DriveSound.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neost.dir/extern/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neost.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neost.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neost.dir/extern/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neost.dir/extern/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neost.dir/extern/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl2.cpp.o -o neost  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libneost_core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioToolbox -framework AudioUnit
